articles.title: 'Mungerilal ke haseen sapne': CM Fadnavis mocks Rahul's prediction of NDA's fall
articles.description: Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis dismissed Rahul Gandhi's prediction of the NDA government's collapse as "daydreaming," comparing it to a popular television serial. Fadnavis made these remarks while inaugurating a logistics park in Nagpur, highlighting its potential to boost the manufacturing sector and strengthen the city's position as a logistics hub.

articles.title: Karnataka river tragedy: 7 women among 8 dead in Bhatkal mishap
articles.description: Tragedy struck Karnataka's Uttara Kannada district on Sunday as at least eight individuals, predominantly women, lost their lives after being swept away while bathing in the Thatte Hakkalu river near Bhatkal. A massive search and rescue operation is underway, with authorities concerned the grim toll may escalate. Further updates are anticipated as the situation unfolds.

articles.title: Jeff Bezos to Amazon users: We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system
articles.description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

articles.title: Pakistan train blast: 24 killed, over 50 injured in Quetta explosion near railway track
articles.description: A powerful explosion targeted a train carrying military personnel near Chaman Phatak railway station in Pakistan's Balochistan province on Sunday, killing at least 24 people and injuring over 50. The blast, which occurred near Quetta, also damaged nearby vehicles and buildings. Authorities declared an emergency in Quetta hospitals and placed institutions on high alert.

articles.title: Bank holidays for the week starting May 25: When and where will banks remain closed? Check state-wise list
articles.description: Bank customers across India should note extended holiday closures from May 26-28, 2026, impacting numerous states for national and religious observances like Kazi Nazrul Islam's birth anniversary and Eid-ul-Adha. Remember, second and fourth Saturdays also mean branch shutdowns. Plan ahead for essential services, as digital banking remains fully operational.

articles.title: India’s fuel demand growth may slow sharply in H2 2026 amid price hikes, austerity push
articles.description: India's transportation fuel demand growth is set for a sharp slowdown in late 2026. Higher prices, government conservation efforts, and a weakening rupee are impacting mobility. Analysts have significantly cut growth forecasts, with petrol demand facing the steepest decline due to reduced commuting and discretionary travel.

articles.title: M-cap: Reliance leads gains as 6 of top-10 most-valued firms add Rs 74,111 crore in a week
articles.description: India's top companies saw a significant market valuation surge last week, with Reliance Industries leading the gains. Despite a volatile trading period, the BSE Sensex managed a modest advance. While several giants added billions, others like Bharti Airtel and Hindustan Unilever experienced notable dips. Analysts point to global optimism and domestic buying as drivers for the market's recovery.

articles.title: Another fuel price hike coming? BPCL says rise ‘inevitable’ if crisis continues
articles.description: Fuel retailers face mounting losses as global energy disruptions persist, potentially forcing further petrol and diesel price hikes. BPCL director Raj Kumar Dubey indicated limited options for policymakers, including price increases or government funding. India is diversifying oil sources and accelerating its push towards green energy to mitigate these challenges.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: IIIT-B announces admissions for engineering and integrated M.Tech courses for 2026–27
articles.description: IIIT-B admissions 2026: The International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore (IIIT-B) has opened applications for its B.Tech and five-year Integrated M.Tech programmes for the academic year 2026–27 through a common application process. The institute is offering courses in Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence and Data Science. IIIT-B stated that admissions will not be conducted through JoSAA. The programmes are designed to combine academic learning, research exposure, and industry engagement across emerging technology domains.
articles.full_text: IIIT-B admissions 2026: The International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore (IIIT-B) has opened applications for its B.Tech and five-year Integrated M.Tech programmes for the academic year 2026–27 through a common application process. The institute is offering courses in Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence and Data Science. IIIT-B stated that admissions will not be conducted through JoSAA. The programmes are designed to combine academic learning, research exposure, and industry engagement across emerging technology domains.

articles.title: RPSC 1st Grade teacher exam city intimation slip 2026 released at rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in: Direct link to download here
articles.description: The Rajasthan Public Service Commission has released the RPSC 1st Grade Teacher Exam City Intimation Slip 2026 on its official website. Candidates can check their allotted exam city using their login credentials, while admit cards will be issued on May 28. Aspirants have been advised to verify examination centre details carefully and plan travel arrangements in advance.

articles.title: Haryana ITI admission 2026 registration begins @ itiharyana.gov.in for technical and non-technical trades across 377 institutes
articles.description: The Directorate of Skill Development and Industrial Training, Haryana, has opened the Haryana ITI Admission 2026-27 process for admissions to 197 Government and 180 Private ITIs across the state. Online applications will begin on June 02, 2026, and continue till June 15, 2026. Candidates who have passed Class 8, 10 or 12 can apply for over 89 engineering and non-engineering trades. Nearly one lakh seats are available across various technical and skill-based programmes.

articles.title: NCERT faces criticism as Hindi medium Class 9 students remain without Maths and Science books
articles.description: NCERT is facing criticism after failing to provide revised Class 9 Hindi medium Mathematics and Science textbooks, even in PDF format, nearly two months into the academic session. Teachers say the delay has disrupted classes, forced translation-based teaching and created confusion over syllabus changes. Students entering summer vacation from May 23, 2026 remain without essential study material ahead of July unit tests and September half-yearly exams. Teachers and parents have questioned NCERT’s preparedness and treatment of Hindi medium students.

articles.title: Taylor-Travis' cutest moments from their NBA game date night
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce captivated fans at an NBA game, showcasing their affection with sweet gestures and playful antics. From sharing a gum to Kelce's epic beer chug on the jumbotron, the couple radiated joy. Swift's blushing reaction and their shared moments, including holding hands and posing with fans, made for an unforgettable night.

articles.title: Aishwarya dishes advice for newcomers at Cannes 2026
articles.description: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan delivered a showstopping red carpet moment at Cannes 2026 in a stunning abyss-blue gown by Amit Aggarwal. Speaking to Brut, she offered heartfelt advice to newcomers saying, "Go out there, discover your passion, and be true to your choices. Everything else will find its place."

articles.title: Fame and stardom have always been natural for Miley Cyrus
articles.description: Recently celebrated with a Hollywood Walk of Fame star, Miley Cyrus expressed how her childhood immersed in the entertainment industry has shaped her perspective on stardom. Growing up alongside her country musician father, the bustle of tours and film sets was her everyday life, rendering Hollywood's glitz and glamour less daunting.

articles.title: Who will be attending Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce’s wedding
articles.description: Details about the highly anticipated wedding of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce remain cloaked in secrecy, igniting speculation about who might receive an invitation—could Blake Lively make an unexpected return? While the couple has yet to reveal a date or venue, buzz hints at a glamorous celebration in the heart of NYC, guarded like a Hollywood elite gathering.
